nasb.text: If I should count them, they would outnumber the sand. When I awake, I am still with You.

esv.text: If I would count them, they are more than the sand. I awake, and I am still with you.

cnv.text: 如果我數點，它們比海沙更多； 我睡醒的時候，仍然與你同在。

ccb.text: 我若数算，它们比海沙还多。 我醒来的时候， 依然与你在一起。

csbs.text: 如果我数算，它们比海沙更多； 我醒来时，我还是与你同在！
